prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约14928→95401（2022年断档异常）→30857→26380→27089，排除2022年异常后，近三年位次在26000–31000区间波动，2025 年基准约27089名，近两年基本稳定；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划2021年68人、2022年69人、2023年70人、2024年74人、2025年74人；2026年计划87人 ，较2025年扩招约17.6%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第83名，近年排名稳定在74–85区间， 属于中上游211层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风相关事件；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等；2022年曾在陕西 文科出现投档线骤降记录，但近年未见明显断档信号；风景园林学为A+学科（全国顶尖），是该校核心优势，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；其余学科评估数据 未进入A-及以上层级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校以农林、环境、林业工程为特色，与当前高热工 科专业匹配度有限；安徽省2026年高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年约46.2万略有下降（约–2.4%），竞争压力小幅缓解；北京林业大学位于北京，对安徽考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在安徽招生人数占其全国总招生比例约2–3%，属中等偏下水平，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次27089名、2026年大幅扩招约17.6%、安徽省考生总数略降、学校声誉偏负面但非严重、211层次对考生仍有较强吸引力等因素，预计20 26年物理类最低录取位次约29744名，区间29244–30244名。扩招是影响位次的最关键因素，使位次明显后移（数字增大），但211层次和考生总数略降形成一定抵消作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 14928 → 95401 (abnormal break in 2022) → 30857 → 26380 → 27089. Excluding the 2022 anomaly, the ranking fluctuated between 26000–31000 in recent three years, with a 2025 baseline of about 27089, basically stable in the last two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province Physics Category was 68 in 2021, 69 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 74 in 2024, and 74 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 87, an increase of about 17.6% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 74–85 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 Gaokao cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and style. Douyin popularity ranking 51st (relatively hot), with moderate attention on short video platforms. In 2022, there was a record of a sudden drop in the admission score line in Shaanxi liberal arts, but no obvious break signal in recent years. Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), which is the core advantage of this university and has strong appeal for related majors. Other discipline evaluation data did not reach the A- level or above.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, but this university is characterized by agriculture, forestry, environment, and forestry engineering, which have limited matching with current hot engineering majors. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, a slight decrease of about 2.4% from about 462,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Anhui candidates. The number of students recruited in Anhui accounts for about 2–3% of its total national enrollment, which is at a lower-middle level, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 27089, a significant enrollment expansion of about 17.6% in 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, a somewhat negative but not severe university reputation, and the strong appeal of the 211 level to candidates, it is predicted that the lowest admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 29744, with a range of 29244–30244. The expansion is the most critical factor affecting the ranking, causing a clear backward shift (increase in number), but the 211 level and slight decrease in candidate numbers form a certain offset.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category has a significant enrollment expansion of about 17.6%, and the lowest admission ranking is expected to shift back to about 29744 (range 29244–30244). Candidates with rankings within 29000 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Liangxi Experimental Class); candidates with rankings between 29500–30000 should target Tier 2 medium-difficulty majors as their main direction; candidates with rankings after 30000 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to the university's flagship Landscape Architecture related majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2834 → 2949 → 3000 → 3012 → 2806, fluctuating narrowly within the 2800–3012 range. In 2025, the ranking rebounded to 2806 (the smallest number), the highest level in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for History in Anhui Province was 9 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 9 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 9, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction. It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and conduct; Douyin popularity ranking 51st (relatively hot), with moderate attention; in 2022, there was a record of a sudden drop in the admission score line for Liberal Arts in Shaanxi, but the ranking for History in Anhui has been stable in recent years; Landscape Architecture is A+ (top in the country), which has limited relevance to the History enrollment majors (Business Administration, English, Law, Natural Geography and Resource Environment, etc.), but it enhances the overall brand of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The History enrollment majors are mainly Business Administration, English, and Law. Among them, Law has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), Business Administration has a clearly discouraging social popularity, and English has moderate popularity (wait-and-see). The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, a slight decrease from about 462,000 in 2025 (approximately –2.4%), slightly easing competition pressure. Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Anhui liberal arts candidates. The university enrolls very few students in History in Anhui (only 9), making it a small-scale enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by individual candidate choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2806, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, a slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing popularity, and the recent ranking fluctuation range of approximately 2800–3012, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History in 2026 will be approximately 2836, with a range of 2336–3336. The unchanged plan provides a basis for stable rankings, and the slight decrease in total candidates eases competition a little, but the negative reputation and the fact that the 2025 ranking is already at a recent high (smallest number) limit further upward potential.
